review_text: This product does reduce toenail fungus, eventually. However, know going in that it will take at least a couple months of daily use to START seeing results, and even after that improvement is quite slow. I'm also not convinced that it will ever permanently eliminate fungus, but it sure beats possible liver damage from internal medications. The bottom line is that if you are committed to making this product part of your daily routine for the long term, it can significantly reduce the nastiness under your nails.

review_text: I discovered the Pulsar brush a couple years ago and much prefer it over the rotating electric. This brush is one of the better ones. After two minutes, my mouth and teeth feel spotless. Will buy again.
product_title: Oral-B Pulsar 3D White Advanced Vivid Toothbrush Medium, Colors May Vary (Pack of 3)
product_description:
Turn on a clean you can feel. Simply press the button on the Oral-B Pulsar 3D White Advanced Vivid Toothbrush to experience vibrating MicroPulse bristles that sweep away plaque and polish away stains on and between teeth. Our most advanced manual toothbrush provides unique cleaning action that both whitens and cleans as part of your complete dental health regimen. Turn on a clean you can feel. Simply press the button on the Oral-B® Pulsar™ 3D White™ Advanced Vivid Toothbrush to experience vibrating MicroPulse™ bristles that sweep away plaque and polish away stains on and between teeth. Our most advanced manual toothbrush provides unique cleaning action that whitens and cleans as part of your complete dental health regimen.

Electric vs Battery

Choosing a Battery-Powered or Electric Toothbrush

With so many electric toothbrush types available on the market, it's often difficult to select the right toothbrush for your own needs. First, let's distinguish between electric toothbrushes and battery-powered toothbrushes.
Battery-Powered Toothbrush
Those who want a dose of power but are weary of electric toothbrushes may like a battery-powered toothbrush (also known as a "battery power toothbrush" or a "battery-operated toothbrush"). Like electric toothbrushes, battery-powered toothbrushes are sometimes simply called "power toothbrushes" due to their use of a battery. While similar in design and cost to regular manual toothbrushes, battery power toothbrushes have just enough vibration to add some extra cleaning action.
Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush
A rechargeable electric toothbrush, also known as a "power toothbrush", is the kind you plug into the wall to recharge, keeping the handle and replacing the brush head every three months or so. Rechargeable electric toothbrushes differ among the kind of cleaning technology they use, such as oscillating-rotating or sonic technology.
Toothbrush Features
Generally rich in technology and features, electric toothbrushes provide many oral health benefits. Some can even enable you to improve your brushing habits. Hi-tech features include:
  • Numerous brushing modes specialized for sensitive teeth, whitening benefits or gum-massaging action
  • Pressure sensors to signal when youre brushing too hard
  • Timers to help you keep track of how long youre brushing each quadrant of your mouth
  • Oscillating-rotating or sonic technology
  • Multiple brush head compatibility so you can choose which kind of bristle design you prefer
Many electric toothbrushes also come with features for added convenience, like a brush head or toothbrush holder and bathroom-counter storage units.

Electric vs Battery

Choosing a Battery-Powered or Electric Toothbrush

With so many electric toothbrush types available on the market, it's often difficult to select the right toothbrush for your own needs. First, let's distinguish between electric toothbrushes and battery-powered toothbrushes.
Battery-Powered Toothbrush
Those who want a dose of power but are weary of electric toothbrushes may like a battery-powered toothbrush (also known as a "battery power toothbrush" or a "battery-operated toothbrush"). Like electric toothbrushes, battery-powered toothbrushes are sometimes simply called "power toothbrushes" due to their use of a battery. While similar in design and cost to regular manual toothbrushes, battery power toothbrushes have just enough vibration to add some extra cleaning action.
Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush
A rechargeable electric toothbrush, also known as a "power toothbrush", is the kind you plug into the wall to recharge, keeping the handle and replacing the brush head every three months or so. Rechargeable electric toothbrushes differ among the kind of cleaning technology they use, such as oscillating-rotating or sonic technology.
Toothbrush Features
Generally rich in technology and features, electric toothbrushes provide many oral health benefits. Some can even enable you to improve your brushing habits. Hi-tech features include:
  • Numerous brushing modes specialized for sensitive teeth, whitening benefits or gum-massaging action
  • Pressure sensors to signal when youre brushing too hard
  • Timers to help you keep track of how long youre brushing each quadrant of your mouth
  • Oscillating-rotating or sonic technology
  • Multiple brush head compatibility so you can choose which kind of bristle design you prefer
Many electric toothbrushes also come with features for added convenience, like a brush head or toothbrush holder and bathroom-counter storage units.

review_summary: Great Idea Poorly Executed - Save your Money
review_text: The graphics are beautiful and would look great on anyone's nails. But it's almost physically impossible to remove the stickers from their protective coating. It took me 20 minutes to remove a test strip. When I did, it immediately tore in half. Additionally, the rest of the strip remained glued to my fingers. When I attempted to remove the stuck pieces, they also ripped. The plastic used is way too thin. Sticks instantly to fingers, clothing AND nails. When you try to preposition a sticker, it either sticks to itself or rips to pieces. Oh and you have to cut EACH sticker BEFORE removing them from the backing. Unfortunately these tiny pieces are even MORE difficult to remove from the protective backing. I hope they fix these problems, as the price is good and their graphics are beautiful.

review_text: This gel is perfect and high quality for nail overlays and extensions. It's strong enough for long nail tips and I like the thickness and quality of the product. My only issue is this is a very odd color of cover pink. Most cover pink gels/acrylic powders are a typical nail pink (like cotton candy pink) and the cover versions are just more opaque. The color of this gel is more like a mauve. It's like a darker vintage rose type of pink. It's not ugly but it's not what I expected. It looks almost like polish when I have it on because it is very opaque and darker than a typical pink. My preference is for the more typical lighter pink colors for these types of products.

Because our product is made with FDA approved ingredients this body paint is safe for adults and children over the age of 12 years old. Our product will not stain your skin and will not rub off on your clothing.Best of all it will not take hours to remove off of your skin, you will simply peel off the paint when you are finished.Liquid Latex Fashions will ship worldwide and offers Express and Ground shipping through UPS.Our Liquid Latex Face and Body Paint is perfect for making or enhancing that head turning one of a kind Halloween Costume.Once dried our Liquid Latex Face and Body Paint will not run, smudge or rub off like other make-up used for costuming so you can wear it under your clothing.Liquid Latex Face and Body Paint is also an excellent choice for showing support for your favorite sports team at the next big game, children's face painting parties, fetish wear, mask making, silk screening, comic book/Sci-Fi and movie conventions, zombie or witch make-up, fake wounds, fake blood, SFX make-up, latex replicas from plaster castings and molds and anything else you can imagine.Liquid latex is Ammonia Free and dries in about a minute.This means less fumes and less time to wait for your finished outlook.Liquid latex can act as a liquid mask or barrier for your cuticles to make the perfect manicure.Just simply paint our latex around your nails and wait for it to dry.Once the liquid latex dries, you are able to paint your nails without a mess because the latex peels right off! Use liquid latex anywhere on your body and it will act like a rubber glove on your skin.Don't worry, your skin will still be able to breathe under the latex.When you're done with the latex, you can simply peel off the liquid latex or after an extended amount of time, it will naturally peel off. 1. review_text: I do a lot of nail art that includes stamping, sponging and a bunch of other really messy designs. My problem is that when I do all of those things the polish gets all over my skin making clean up take a bit longer than I like. So I needed to find something that could help with that problem. In comes this liquid latex! I ordered one in the hopes that it would help with keeping the skin around my nails clean while I'm doing those messy manicures. I cleaned out an empty nail polish bottle and filled it up with this liquid latex. Then I used the brush from the nail polish bottle to apply the liquid latex to the skin around my nails. I gave it a few minutes to dry then did my manicure. Once done with the manicure I used a little nail polish remover on a brush to make sure none of the latex was attached to the polish on my nail (don't want to ruin the manicure by pulling the polish on my nail off with the latex). Then, using tweezers, I pulled the latex off of each finger. For the most part it came off easily leaving clean up much easier with less to clean. This was a lifesaver! I am very pleased with this liquid latex. The only thing I don't like about it is the smell, it's almost a fishy smell. It is very strong at first when applying. Once dried the smell does dissipate for the most part so it doesn't bother me that much. Disclaimer: I am not affiliated with the seller or this product and am under no obligation to provide a positive review nor do I receive any sort of compensation one way or the other. This review is my own opinion and should be viewed and treated as such. If my review was at all helpful to you please click the relevant button, thank you.

review_text: These are great for the person who has horrible nails and doesn't have the time or money to go to a salon or likes to change color often. They come in lots of choices, mostly with designs but I prefer solid colors. The company who makes these, Broadway, has recently introduced longer nails. I've been using these for over a year and wouldn't go back to manicures. I love that they just press on, no need to use glue...just peel and stick. No waiting for polish to dry and no smudges, ever. Application is really quick and goes faster with more experience. Deciding which nail goes on each finger takes a little time but if you record which number goes on which finger it will go faster in the future. There are tiny numbers under the nail tip, covered by the peel-off plastic. I pull it back a little and use a magnifying glass. I save the extras to use if nails pop off. I've recommended these to everyone and they're amazed they aren't real. If I must post a negative it would be they don't always last a week but that's a minor point to me cuz I love them so much.

review_summary: Contains an allergen, didn't help my skin.
review_text: Contains an allergen so it didn't help my skin. This contains Methylchloroisothiazolinone and Methylisothiazolinone, the latter of which had the dubious honor of earning the title of Contact Allergen of the Year in 2013 from the American Contact Dermatitis Society. I believe I have a sensitivity (allergic reaction) to these chemicals so when I used this to soothe my skin, it didn't help and may have made it worse. I'm surprised to find these preservatives in a product that stays on your skin. They are known allergens and most companies have restricted their use to products that are washed off the skin. I used Banana Boat Aloe Vera Sun Burn Relief Sun Care After Sun Lotion - 16 Ounce and it really helped. Made my skin feel cooler and made the redness slowly go away.

review_text: I've recently heard of velvet nails, and to do that you need flocking powder. I figured i'd try this set out from Bundle monster and help you guys out! Each individual case was closed and no powder got out during shipping. The cases were even filled to the top! I believe I got 1 duplicate though (out of 36? that's great!) When doing velvet nails do not put top coat on. But if you must, do not put on a lot of topcoat, if you put a little you can still fell the texture but it will be a little stiff. (note: when using light flocking powder adding top coat will 'change the color' of the flocking powder. (i.e light pink to a slightly darker shade of pink) Now. when you wash your hands when you have velvet nails, the flocking powder will absorb the water but you can just dry your hands (dab) and it will gain back its textury feel in no time! Keep in mind that velvet nails last about an average of 4 days. not because it comes off but when using light colors you can collect dust in them when doing daily tasks. Will buy from this seller again Recommended To all who love texture nail art (i.e caviar beads, candy coat, crackle) Its very fun to do! I will upload pictures of my product asap for you guys!

review_text: I LOVE THESE THINGS! I've been using these nail strips for awhile now, and I've tried a few other brands as well, BMC is my favorite by far. So reasonably priced too. review_summary: I'm on the fence about these.
review_text: Pros: -Price. This is literally 5 sets for the price of 1, compared to some of the nicer brands. -Very pretty prints. I have the Brights and the Florals and they each have some designs that are better looking than any nail decal I've used before--and I have used quite a few. -A little thicker than average, making them less delicate and prone to tears. -Durable, lasted about a week without chipping or peeling up. Cons: -A little thicker than average, making it almost impossible to apply them without wrinkles. -Only 6 strips per hand, requiring more cutting to size. -Will not remove with acetone. They have to be peeled up, which can damage the nail bed. Just as an FYI: -Almost all of the designs in the sets I got were glitter designs, even ones that didn't appear glittery in the pictures. The only two not glitter, were textured with raised metallic sections. I like a glitter manicure, but if you prefer matte or creme the designs may not be to your taste. -I found they actually look and last better without a top coat. Personally, I prefer Sally Hansen, even with the not quite as pretty prints and increased price because Sally Hansen I can apply perfectly. These, as long as I'm careful, the wrinkles are small enough I'm the only one who notices them, but I'm particular enough about my nails that even slight imperfections bother me.

product_title: Liquid Latex Fashions Body Paint, Metallic Silver, 4 Ounce
product_description: Whether you need to deck yourself out for a dance party, build up dramatic special effects on your skin for the stage, or paint your face to support your team at a sporting event, this metallic liquid latex body paint will do the job. Best used over a base coat of liquid latex body paint, it dries to a shimmery and shiny finish and does not run, smudge, or rub off on your clothes or furniture like other costume makeup tends to do. The color stays on until you want to take it off, which makes it safe to wear under or near clothing. Another cool way to use it is on top of your nails as nail art! Liquid latex is ammonia-free and dries in about a minute, which means less fumes. It goes on and peels off easily. Give it a try. Its easier than you think, and more fun than you ever thought possible.

review_summary: One star as body paint, Five stars as hair removal cream
review_text: If you love getting your body hair forcibly ripped out then this is the product for you. First time body painters over here----did not know that you should be completely hairless for this to be an enjoyable experience (the removal). Paint went on okay...off....a different story. Although my husband's costume (Guy Diamond from Trolls for Key West Fantasy Fest), was a mega hit...he ended up having to shave his beard off because the paint would not come out. He also lost most of his leg hair in the removal process. Prettttty painful. Hairy peeps beware.

review_text: "Jeff's Wife" - This is not true to color, it dries quite a bit darker, as you can see from the pic, but since I only use it for nail art I don't care but some of you might. I bought the pink back in Feb. 2015, still using it just got tired of the color, and this one seems slightly less opaque but maybe it's because that one is pink on pale skin but a second coat fixes the opacity, (only 1 coat in the pic). It may leave a few specks of the shimmer on your skin when you peel it off but they wipe away effortlessly. If you're new to nail art and want to use this for that, I do suggest you transfer some to an empty polish bottle (cleaned with acetone or brand new doesn't matter) using a syringe with some sort of tip, an eye dropper or even a straw, this will keep the large bottle from drying out. This 4 oz bottle will last you a very long time, I still have about half the bottle I bought in Feb. 2015, and costs a fraction of the price as those other brands marketed specifically for nail art.

review_text: I like these. Mostly, I wanted something that would hold my polish bottles still, so they wouldn't skitter across the table when trying to one-handedly trying to wipe the brush off. But I also wanted something that would hold my tall, skinny bottles so they wouldn't tip over. These will fit the bill. I don't know how well bottles will "tilt" and stay put that way so you can get to the bottom of the bottle. Right now, they're not staying tilted. BUT I think they'll loosen up a bit with use and might be fine. And larger bottles like OPI, Revlon, and the larger Sally Hansen bottles do fit into the larger one, but it's a tight fit. The smaller one is perfect for Sally Hansen's skinny bottles and for Julep polish. I haven't actually used these for a manicure yet, so I'm not sure how well the rubber will stay put on my work surface, but I can use one of those flat rubber things you use to open jars, and it should stay just fine. Overall, I'm pleased with this purchase.

review_summary: Unique nail stunner that you can keep in your jewelry box
review_text: These are beautiful nail jewelry that are ever bit as beautiful on as look in the picture. I saw these and fell in love. I ordered one in every color I could find and am so happy with them. They are rings that fit on the end of your finger and look like a fancy finger nail. The enamel work is stunning. This one is a beautiful baby pink with a black crown. They fit my fingers perfectly. I wear a size small in gloves and I like the feeling of pushing them securely on. They fit past my first knuckle so that the nail lays exactly on top of my natural nail. I wear a size 6 ring, but since this rest under the top knuckle, I am not sure what size it would be. I was worried that these might be uncomfortable or slide of easily and they just like wearing any other midi ring. I love the look of fancy manicures with lots of jewelry or crystals set in them- but I do not want to wear false nails. This is the best of both worlds. I get all of the bling without wrecking my natural nails. Light dances off the tiny clear crystals, just so pretty. I wear one at a time for just a little bit of unexpected fun and I get so many compliments! My friends had not seen anything like it before and couldn't wait to order them for themselves. These are super unique and I have not found anyone else wearing anything like it. So if you are looking for quality piece that not everybody is wearing- this is for you. This is a quality piece that will last a long time. It has a small bit a weight to it- not like cheap plastic. It feels like the weight of an average ring. It does not rub or scratch- very comfortable to wear. These are a great addition to my jewelry box!

review_summary: Great place to store my MoYou plates!
review_text: I got this to store my MoYou UK plates. They fit perfectly. (I actually adored the little covers that the MoYou plates came in, but have to slide each plate out to look at the designs to choose one.) This case is perfect b/c I can just flip though them and see them all clearly. It's very study and it seems like it will hold up well. Very happy with this. The price was very reasonable for the quality, (especially if you compare it to the cost of the MoYou case, yikes!) 8/24/16 - After using this for about a week, one of the pockets split along the outer edge. Still love it, but since it's specifically made for metal plates, this shouldn't happen. Also, since MoYou plates have a plastic backing, it wasn't even the metal that could have made it split, just wasn't crimped correctly on that edge. I fixed it with clear packing tape and none of the others look like they are splitting, so I hope this will be the only occurrence. I'll also note that if you totally fill it with plates, it will be heavy! I took it out of my nail case because I thought the weight was too much stress for my nail case handle.

review_text: I love this organizer. It's beautiful & it holds a lotta plates. However, this was delivered during a cold spell and I was dumb & didn't let the plastic sleeves warm up before I started trying to put my plates into them...needless to say, the cold plastic was quite unforgiving and I ripped three of them right off the bat. lol I don't know why it took me so long to realize that I needed to let them warm up & soften a bit (you'd think that I woulda figured it out after I ruined the *first* one! Sadly, no...I kept going & ruined two more. Dummy. ) My advice to you is, if this organizer is delivered to you during winter months, either let it sit at room temperature for several hours, or hit it with the hair dryer for a minute. Once the plastic sleeves become more pliable, it's easy to slide your plates into them.

review_text: I bought these because I'm always afraid of spilling my nail polish on the countertop or floor. These little holders are very stable and quite thick/heavy. Having a 3-pack allows me to keep the base coat, color, and top coat at the ready, each in their own holder - very convenient. I knocked off one star because unless you have a specific bottle shape they won't tilt as shown in the photo. I have about eight different shaped bottles for various brands of polish, and only a few of them are shaped correctly to take advantage of the "no-hands tilt". With the bottle kept stable in the holder it will stay upright, and with the front slot, it's easy to tilt the bottle to wet the brush using just one hand. This is much better than trying to hold the bottle with one hand while handling the brush with the other. I would definitely recommend this product!

review_summary: So much better than then the thick, jelly-like Aloe Vera gels
review_text: I received this product at a reduced price and was eager to try it and review it. I have always used the blue, thick Aloe Vera gel. It was goopy and sort of like Jello. Last year, I saw it in clear which was nicer than the fake blue stuff but still had a strange thick, jelly-like consistency. My husband sunburns constantly even with super high SPF on so we have Aloe Vera on hand all the time. It's also great for minor burns, cuts, scrapes and all sorts of things. This large bottle has 16 ounces of pure Aloe Vera in it. There are just a few inert preservatives and an ingredient to help the gel coat the skin better. The gel isn't really a gel but more like a serum. It is yellowish in color, very pale, and transparent. When I first poured some out (see photo), I couldn't imagine how it could do the job of soothing skin and actually absorbing into skin but but I was wrong. This gel is so much nicer to work with than the thick, jelly type. It immediately absorbs and isn't greasy at all. There's no tacky feeling or, really, any sign that the gel is on the skin at all. But you will feel it soothe. I went to a graduation party the other day and both my husband and I inadvertently got a bit of sunburn, him much more than I. We both used this gel to sooth and cool the areas and it worked so well. My husband, who was a devoted Aloe Vera blue jelly user, loves the consistency of this product and how it just applies and dries with absolutely no wait time and no stickiness or greasiness. It immediately soothes and makes skin feel better. I even took my make up off with it last nigh! I used some on a cotton round and it did a great job and left my face feeling soothed and clean. There are a ton of uses for Aloe Vera and this brand is even more versatile than the thick, goopy stuff. I truly like it more than any brand I have tried and I really didn't expect to. I thought I would hate it, to be honest, but I am a convert. I am already planning to buy more since we use it year round and like to have it on hand. Give it a try. You will get rid of a lot of the extra chemicals and thickeners and get more Aloe Vera for your money. Plus the formula is perfect for applying and going with no wait time for drying or for the stickiness to pass. Very, very good stuff that is somewhat unconventional as far as consistency but once tried, I can't imagine many people wanting to switch back to the jelly stuff.

review_summary: Great product, soothing yet effective. Will be purchasing again.
review_text: I love Sublime products. So naturally, when I saw this item, I HAD to have it. After a long, hot summer, my face really needed a little TLC - and this was the perfect solution. I was very excited when the Amazon package arrived at my door step. In the box was a charming little cloth satchel and in it was the Polish. The Polish smells wonderful. It is subtle but fresh and not overpowering - I am sensitive to smells and cannot stand strong perfumes. Sublime really nailed the scent. The texture is lightly grainy, in a good way. I have used face Polish in the past where the texture was too fine and I felt like I had to really scrub to get any exfoliation... It was not the case here. The texture was spot on. It wasn't harsh at all, and my skin is quite sensitive. The instructions are pretty standard.. Wet face, massage in circular motion, let sit for a couple of minutes, massage briefly and then wash off. The results, however, were surprising. It left my skin incredibly soft and silky, after just one use. After several uses, my skin felt like it had completely recovered from a summer in the sun. Looking at the ingredient list was also very reassuring.. The first ingredient listed is aloe.. No wonder it is so soothing. Overall, I am really happy with this product. The best part was that when my husband got home he actually noticed a difference (without me mentioning anything). I purchased this product at a reduced price for testing and review purposes.

product_description_filled: Product: ZEN FACE POLISH, Gentle Exfoliant by Sublime Beauty NATURALS. 2 Oz. Organic with Bauxite & Moisturizing Ingredients for Face and Body.

review_text: I received this product at a reduced price in consideration for my honest and unbiased written review. I used the Zen Face Polish by Sublime Beauty Naturals as soon as I got it in the mail. The product is very concentrated and you just need a small amount. It does require an easy hand as you can get over zealous with it. That is a good thing! A little goes a long way and the product, while it is not a HUGE jar, will last for a long time when used as directed just a few times a week. I began with a wet face and gently massaged it into my skin in circular motions. I waited 2 minutes and gently dampened it and massaged for a short time again. The product is well named. My skin did indeed feel polished. It was smoother and almost silken to the touch. I used a very good moisturizer afterwards and am very pleased with the product results! I would recommend this product for exfoliation and skin renewal.

review_text: I hate to give anything under four stars. I feel so bad, but I can't justify giving anything other than one star here. If I could, I wouldn't give any stars. First of all this took forever to get here; over a month. I'm not sure if it was because of the shipping time or what, but the glue was semi dry. It was thick and stringy and for the most part unusable. I tried it anyhow. It went on with some chunks. I brushed those away and tried to get a smooth enough coat so that my foils didn't have lumps and bumps. It took a long time to dry. One of my nails that the glue applied on fairly smooth, didn't take as long but still took a while. I applied my foil and made sure to press down all the areas. When I lifted the plastic from the foil I expected to have some spots that didn't get filled in. Normally that's how foil applies for me and I just press over those small areas again with the foil. However, when I did those steps with this glue, almost none of the foil transferred over. I kept trying to press the foil over it again and again, with no luck. I had better results using my basic nail polish as a glue than trying to use this glue! I've actually purchased a better glue product at my local Dollar Store :(

review_summary: One of the better nail stampers on the market....
review_text: Having bought multiple nail stampers including the pink Konad one and multiples of the clear round silicone ones, Ive finally decided this brand is one of the best, if not the best. My only reason for not giving 5 stars is because its smaller than Id prefer. You get 2 round silicone pieces where one is red and rectangular and the other is white and round. (They both fit into the handle however, the red one is cut out into a rectangle shape where you easily place your thumb or finger onto or, you stamp onto the nail) I personally LOVE the red one simply because it rarely fails in picking up the image. I also like the rectangular shape because you can line up your image directly on the surface and follow along the length of your finger without double and triple checking you haven't messed up exactly where you're going to stamp. The handle is great too. Its metal, not plastic so its heavier than you expect. No worries about spilling any acetone on or near it which could ruin the silicone or a plastic handle and it just feels like a high quality piece. As far as priming it - I did. But only quickly. I ran it under warm tap water and used a teeny bit of Dawn dish soap to clean any oil off and when it was finished air drying, I used it without trouble. Another reason I love his too is its somewhat universal as a handle/holder for other round silicone pads as long as they're the same size (I noticed several of my other stamper pads will easily fit into the handle) you can swap them out. Note - if you have others and are making decals with reverse stamping you can use this handle to stamp multiple times by popping the others right in the space. Anyway, if you're into nail stamping and aren't having luck with the stamper youve been using this is a great alternative, rarely fails and is a great value for the money.

review_summary: I was really not liking this stamper at first, ...
review_text: I was really not liking this stamper at first, until I figured out the trick to it, so I thought I'd share what I learned: I used a Magic Eraser to prime it. In hindsight, probably wasn't necessary, though. ***right here is the million dollar secret***: press it down **GENTLY** to pick up the stamp! After hours and hours of giant messes, nsfw language and passionate vows to jump in front of a truck, I discovered- very much by accident- that I was pressing down too hard with the stamper. I found that I need to gently just touch down the stamper to the plate (for me, I found that "rolling" the stamper wasn't working; I found I needed to put the stamper straight down and pick it straight back up again. Gently!) Once I figured that out it was smooth sailing from there on... Hope this helps!

product_title: FlyItem® 50 Pairs Professional Ultrathin Lint Free Facial Under Eye Gel Patches For Eyelash Extension
product_description:
Instead of using surgical tape or even cellophane tape to hold down lower lashes ,the collagen eye patches are used during the eyelash extension process for client comfort. These Eye patches stimulate the skin's collagen to brighten the skin under the eye during the eyelash extension treatment. The Firming and Brightening Eye Patch uses the patented technology that slowly releases moisture and nutrients to your eye area by harnessing the warmth of your skin. As a result, your under-eye area is more hydrated, less puffy, your skin elasticity is improved and your dark eye circles diminished over time. When used during the eyelash extensions service, it holds down the lower lashes while giving a luxurious treatment to the under eye area. As it is lint-free, there are no stray strands of lint or fiber to spoil the look of your eyelash extensions.

Package Including:
50 pairs

Size:
7cm x 2.8 cm each tape

Uses :
Covering the lower lashes during eyelash extension

Cautions :
*Keep out of reach of children.
*For external use only.
*Avoid contact with eyes.If cantact does occur,flush
*eyes with cool water.
*Avoid using on skin which is sensitive to bandages,tapes or peel-off masks.
*Avoid using on blemishes,pimples,irritated or sunburned skin.
*Use immediately after opening.

lngredients :
Water,Glycerin,Allantoin,Sorbitol,Sodium Polyacrylate,Cellulose Gum,Polyacrylic Acid,Ricinus Communis (Castor),Seed Oil,Triethylhexanoin,Kaolin,Tartaric Acid,Aluminum Glycinate,Titanium Dioxide,Disodium EDTA,Methylisothiazolinone,lodopropynyl-butylcarbamate,Tocopheryl Acetate,Aloe Barbadensis Leat Extract

product_title: **NEW 2016** KISS 2x Longer Lasting imPRESS "SYMPHONY" by Broadway Press-On Manicure Nails
product_description_filled: Product: **NEW 2016** KISS 2x Longer Lasting imPRESS "SYMPHONY" by Broadway Press-On Manicure Nails.

review_summary: I have to admit that they have AWESOME staying power
review_text: I didn't buy these off Amazon, but at a local drug store. I have to admit that they have AWESOME staying power. I have used the Kiss Acrylic glue on in the past and loved them, and I assumed (wrongly) that the stick on nails wouldn't stay on. These were on for nearly a week with no signs of going anywhere - I actually had to use a little force to remove them. HOWEVER, and, for me, this was a BIG however - these nails didn't fit my nail very well. I actually have small nails, small enough that most fake nails seem oversized, but I had trouble finding nails that were wide enough for my tiny, kid sized nails. Ummmmm? Who are these made for? I love, love, LOVE the length (even nicer than the Kiss Real Short) and the thickness but the sizing makes me leave off a star. It was seriously annoying to run my hands through my hair and pull out strands that snagged on the edges of the nail. I've heard that trying the Medium can give you a wider nail, but I don't want LONG nails so I'm not sure....I will probably give them a try just to see. One other thing to note is that while these never fell off or came loose, they sort of "moved" on my nail. If I forgot not to use my nail when opening a package or something it felt like the nail was detaching. I would look and it wasn't, but I could feel it shift back and then into place again. Probably due to the nature of the adhesive, and maybe why they stay on rather than pop off like a glue on nail, but it was a little odd.
product_title: **NEW 2016** KISS 2x Longer Lasting imPRESS "SYMPHONY" by Broadway Press-On Manicure Nails
product_description_filled: Product: **NEW 2016** KISS 2x Longer Lasting imPRESS "SYMPHONY" by Broadway Press-On Manicure Nails.

review_text: I had salon acrylic nails for years, but got tired of spending the money for fills and the damage to my real nails. I have always had very weak nails and just cannot grow them out. As soon as they get past my fingertip, they break off, so I've been living with short stubby nails for quite awhile. I tried many different kinds of nail strengtheners, but nothing helped. I did my own nail art, etc to make them look as nice as I could, but I wished they could be a bit longer. I had recently admired someone's nails at a function and she told me they were these imPRESS nails. My first thought was "no way!". I remember the Lee press on nails back in the day (yes, I just aged myself) and they would last a few hours before they came off. With her recommendation though, I purchased a set and gave them a try. I trimmed them just a bit - they weren't long, but I've gotten used to short nails, so I trimmed them to just beyond my fingertips. First, they're beautiful... amazing color and very shiny and do not look fake in any way. Second, I've had them on for over a week now and they've showed no signs of coming off. I've showered, done dishes, some gardening as well as working in an office every day and they're still going strong. They're flexible, so they conform to the shape of your nails, but they do have a curve to them. If your nails are flat, these might not adhere as well. I am a huge fan and would highly recommend these. Even if they did only last a week, it's still a fraction of the cost compared to getting them done at the salon!

review_text: I have been looking to try something different to remove the calluses on my feet. It only takes about an hour to charge the unit fully when needed too, and also has 2 speeds which is great. The manicure tools attach to the side through a hole in the roller that is smooth and also work great. I'm pretty impressed with this tool all the way around and am glad to have found such a quality callus remover online, but this is truly a great one. review_text: Sandals and flip flops season is here again, there is no way of hiding my messed up feet with the uncomfortably arid, embarrassing callused feet. I have used several products to get rid of the dry skin, from the micro plane, foot file, pumice stone etc. Those are time-consuming and a lot of work. Not to mention, if I put more pressure, I will get some cuts. Then, after all those procedures, I still end up with rough skin. Doing all of those steps are getting hard for me now, especially shredding before filing; I don't want to deal with those anymore. So, goodbye, micro plane, hello, KlipPro. I am impressed with this callus remover. I could not believe my eyes that this powerful tool got rid of my hard, rough skin, and callus in a jiff. I only used the first speed setting. With hardly even a pressure, and just gliding. It did not take long, instantly saw great results. Plus, in just one step. I didn't even have to use foot file. What I love about this, is the mint green color, its cute compact design, lightweight, and so easy to use. You won't need batteries because it is rechargeable. With the usb cable you can charge from your laptop, making it travel-friendly too or on a wall outlet with AC adapter. The 5 mini manicure/ pedicure attachment tools are a plus that came with the pouch that you can keep the mini tools in for storage. I wish the pouch is for the whole set including the callus remover. The callus remover has the safety cover too. Now, the downside, it is a bit pricey, when its worn out and time to replace the roller. I am not sure if theres a universal roller for this because I didn't find any replacement roller for KlipPro. Otherwise, you will have to buy the whole set again. I purchased the callus remover at a discount in exchange for my honest review.

review_summary: A durable, cute set of nail clippers that I cannot live without!
review_text: I was hesitant to purchase the KevinAnna Smiling Face Nail Clipper set because the price seemed a little high at first thought and I have wasted so much money on nail clippers that are of poor quality and end up in the trash. I considered the fact that this is a nail clipping set so you get the fingernail and toenail clippers in this set so the price is actually average. I decided to purchase the set of clippers and in hopes that they were as great as they sound. I purchased the KevenAnna Smiling Face Nail Clipper Set and they arrived promptly. I opened the package and pulled the clippers from the box. The clippers were in a reusable plastic storage bag - this will be a great help for me because I cannot seem to keep up with a set of nail clippers. The nail clippers are stainless steel so they are heavy duty and will last for years! I was very impressed with the auality of the clippers and the cute smily face cut out on each of the clippers. As soon as I opened the nail clippers I immediately used both the fingernail and the toenail clippers. I was extremely happy with the way the clippers clip your nails quickly and evenly. Most other clippers that I have used are hesitant when you press down on the clippers and don't clip your nails on the first try resulting in uneven and jagged nails. These clippers are a must have for men and women! The KevenAnna Smiling Face Nail Clipper Set is a set of nail clippers that I cannot live without! I will be purchasing another set to have as a backup set because I always misplace clippers, although I am hopeful that the reusable plastic pouch they came in will help me keep up with the clippers better. I have received this product at a discounted rate in exchange for my honest, unbiased opinion of the product. This has in no way altered my review of the product. All information in my review is from my own personal use of the product for several weeks. I hope that my review has helped you decide on which product to purchase. I promise you will love these clippers and agree that you cannot live without them! Thank you for taking the time to read my review. I hope that you have found it helpful!

review_summary: ... being able to sample Kids' Crest Cavity Protection Sparkle Fun Toothpaste as part of a promotion from the brand
review_text: My daughter was very excited about being able to sample Kids' Crest Cavity Protection Sparkle Fun Toothpaste as part of a promotion from the brand. In fact, she took the tube and placed it in the bathroom, all on her own. I felt that she was drawn more to the container instead of what was inside. She approved of the toothpaste, which is a plus. Although the bubble gum flavor is not one of her favorite flavors, she really did't complain about it. I was at least expecting a major complaint because she has refused to use other bubble gum flavors that I have purchased in the past! So far, so good. She continues to use this product, and as a mom, I'm happy! Her teeth appear to be clean after use and the scent is a plus. Thanks for making this product fun to use and for making brushing a bit more interesting! "What would I want to know before I get this product?" I would want to know what flavors the toothpaste come in and the color of the toothpaste. These are VERY important to my six year old. Also, I would want to know that it was a leader in cavity prevention!
